title: doctor verb
manager: `doctor` — an environment diagnostic that reports the host, runtime versions, store configuration, and anything else that affects whether a machine will run and replay correctly. The mundane but essential "why doesn't this work on my machine" tool: it surfaces the environment table so a support conversation starts from facts instead of twenty rounds of questions about what version of what is installed where.
cs: `doctor` env table; host/runtime/store/config diagnostics; the environment-facts tool for support.
